meaning: n.酒石,[医]牙垢,鞑靼人,凶悍的人,难对付的人
examples: She can be quite a tartar.
By 3-5 years: All teeth may have tartar build-up and some tooth wear.
Place the egg whites and cream of tartar in a large bowl and whisk until frothy.
Put the sugar, cream of tartar and water in a small saucepan and stir to combine.
Scaling may be uncomfortable, especially if your gums are already sensitive or you have extensive plaque and tartar buildup.
